questions.label: Where will the server run?
questions.help: Local stdio for Claude Desktop/Code, or an HTTP server for Docker/systemd.

questions.label: Bearer token
questions.help: Any non-empty string enables bearer auth. Leave blank for no authentication.

questions.label: OpenAI API key
questions.help: Required for the OpenAI provider (DALL-E 3, GPT-Image-1). Leave blank to skip OpenAI.

questions.label: Google API key (Gemini)
questions.help: Required for the Gemini provider (Imagen 3). Leave blank to skip Gemini.

questions.label: SD WebUI host URL
questions.help: Base URL of a running AUTOMATIC1111/Forge/reForge instance, e.g. http://localhost:7860. Leave blank to skip SD WebUI.

questions.label: Default provider
questions.help: Provider used when no keyword triggers auto-selection. "auto" picks the first configured provider.

questions.label: Read-only mode
questions.help: Disables write tools (generate, transform). Default: true.

questions.label: Scratch directory
questions.help: Directory where generated images are saved. Defaults to ~/.image-generation-mcp/.

questions.label: Log level
questions.help: One of DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.

questions.label: Rich logging
questions.help: Enable pretty terminal output. Disable for JSON/plain logs in production.

guards.message: No provider is configured — the server will start but cannot generate images. Fill in at least one of: OpenAI API key, Google API key, or SD WebUI host.
